configurations.name: lantern-dev
configurations.comment: Runs from the dedicated dev-server worktree via the .dev-worktree junction (-> C:/dev/lantern-os-dev), so the automation's resets/branch-switches on the MAIN checkout don't yank code/env out from under the running dev server. Update its code with: git -C C:/dev/lantern-os-dev fetch && git -C C:/dev/lantern-os-dev reset --hard origin/master, then restart.
